Deepwater Greaves  
 

Lore Item
Slot: LEGS
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 26
STR: +8 DEX: +8 AGI: +7 HP: +50
Effect: Spirit Strength (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 10.0) at Level 45
WT: 7.5 Size: LARGE
Class: PAL
Race: ALL except IKS VAH
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Lore Item
Slot: LEGS
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 26
STR: +8 DEX: +8 AGI: +7 HP: +50

We dropped VS today for wiz epic, 32 people L63 average, never seen him drop so fast, it was hilarious. Got DW greaves too, but nobody wanted em.

▲ Page top
got them
QuoteReply
# Sep 13 2002 at 4:16 AM Rating: Default
Lamini
View User Forum
279 posts
I was invited to a pickup raid for Venril Sathir. I pulled him and he procced 2 1500hp lifetaps immediately. But he hit me for 300 before the procs and then his last hit for 250 after the proc killed me. He dropped 3 classes worth of greaves! And I was the only Paladin!
____________________________
Lamini http://www.magelo.com/eq_view_profile.html?num=113217
Lamini's comeback: http://eq.magelo.com/profile/1399072

# Apr 11 2002 at 11:21 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591766558305
Scholar
68 posts
Do you notice that Trolls/Orge's/Dark Elves can all where DW Greaves. But the last time I checked, None of these races had an option of being a paladin. Im just saying, Seem's odd to me.

Can you imagine seeing a Big Troll Paladin, who'd da ever thunk that one up. Maybe they gonna open class options. Highly unlikely.

Great Legs
QuoteReply
# Jun 27 2001 at 10:40 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757666894
3 posts
Well I got these the other day and I must say that I love them. Great AC, nice stats, +HPS, and a spell that paladins DON'T already have for a change (daring, stun, endure magic, cancle magic, symbol, soothe /sigh).

Daragoth Dragonbane
Druzzil Ro
